title: scutellaria zivari
intro: Scutellaria zivari, also known as Zivari skullcap, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae), native to the mountainous regions of Turkey. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria zivari include reducing inflammation, improving anxiety and stress relief, and exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial activities. Herbal preparations of Scutellaria zivari include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
